# Sequels
> Web automation and technical consulting for Indian MSMEs

Sequels builds digital infrastructure for small and medium businesses in India, replacing bloated software with lean, zero-cost architectures.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://services.sequels.diy/
- Services & Pricing: https://services.sequels.diy/services
- Industry Verticals: https://services.sequels.diy/verticals
- About Us: https://services.sequels.diy/about
- Contact: https://services.sequels.diy/contact
